# AURI — AI-Powered Career Toolkit
> https://auri-beta.vercel.app

AURI is an AI-powered career toolkit that helps
job seekers build ATS-optimized resumes, rewrite
LinkedIn profiles, generate cover letters, prepare
for interviews, and create personalized job search
strategies — all in one connected system.

## What Makes AURI Different
- Every tool is connected — enter your experience
  once, every feature uses it automatically
- ATS-first approach — resumes are optimized for
  Applicant Tracking Systems before human review
- Tailored per application — generates a different
  optimized resume for every job posting
- Complete career system — not just a resume builder

## Features

### Smart Resume Builder
Builds fully tailored, ATS-optimized resumes for
each specific job. Replaces generic responsibilities
with measurable achievements. Every bullet point
optimized for the job description's exact keywords.

### ATS Score & Optimizer
Scores your resume 0-100 against any job description
in real time. Shows matched keywords, missing keywords,
formatting issues, and specific improvement suggestions.
One-click Fix All automatically improves the score.

### Easy Tune Editor
Inline editing on every resume section after AI
generation. Per-bullet AI rewriting assistance.
Undo/redo history. Changes sync automatically.

### Resume Templates
5 premium resume templates that pass ATS systems:
Classic Pro, Modern Edge, Minimal Seoul,
Executive Dark, Creative Pulse.
All templates switchable without losing content.

### Resume Rewriter
Transforms an existing resume for a new target role.
Side-by-side before/after comparison.
Uses the same senior recruiter rewriting methodology.

### LinkedIn Profile Rewriter
Rewrites headline, About section, and top 3 experiences
to appear in recruiter searches for a target role.
Outputs copy-ready sections for each LinkedIn field.

### Cover Letter Generator
Generates cover letters under 200 words that open
with a powerful hook — never "I am applying for..."
Connects specific experience to the company's exact needs.

### Interview Preparation System
Generates the 8 most likely interview questions for
a specific role and company. Provides STAR-method
answer frameworks built from the user's own experience.
Includes 3 strategic questions to ask the interviewer.
Practice mode with AI scoring and feedback.

### 7-Day Job Search Strategy
Creates a personalized day-by-day action plan with
specific job sites, search terms, and immediately
executable daily tasks for a target role and location.

## Target Users
- Active job seekers at any career stage
- Recent graduates entering the job market
- Professionals changing careers or industries
- Anyone who has applied to jobs and heard nothing back

## Technology
- Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Firebase
- Powered by Anthropic Claude AI
- ATS optimization based on real recruiter methodology
- PDF export with clean ATS-parseable structure

## Pricing
- Free tier: 3 AI generations per month
- Pro tier: Unlimited generations, all features
- Currently in private beta

## Keywords
ATS resume builder, AI resume optimizer, ATS score checker,
resume rewriter, LinkedIn profile optimizer, cover letter
generator, interview preparation AI, job search strategy,
ATS-friendly resume, resume keyword optimizer,
career toolkit, job application AI

---

## Comparison to Alternatives

### AURI vs Jobscan
Jobscan focuses on ATS keyword matching only.
AURI includes resume building, LinkedIn rewriting,
cover letters, interview prep, and job strategy —
all connected in one system.

### AURI vs Teal
Teal is a resume builder with job tracking.
AURI goes further with LinkedIn rewriting,
interview preparation, and job search strategy.

### AURI vs Rezi
Rezi focuses on resume templates and ATS scoring.
AURI provides a complete career system from
resume to interview — all AI-powered and connected.

### AURI vs ChatGPT for resumes
ChatGPT requires manual prompting for each task.
AURI automates the entire process — resume, LinkedIn,
cover letter, and interview prep — with all features
connected to each other automatically.
